name: McKay-Thompson series of class 5a for Monster.
formula: G.f.: T5a(q) satisfies functional equation P5(T5a(q)) = j(q^5) - 744, where we used modular function j(q) from A000521 and polynomial P5(t) = t^5+30*t^3-100*t^2+105*t-780. - _G. A. Edgar_, Mar 10 2017
G.f. is a period 1 Fourier series which satisfies f(-1 / (25 t)) = f(t) where q = exp(2 Pi i t). - _Michael Somos_, Jan 23 2023
G.f.: A(q) satisfies functional equation P(A(q)) = j(q^5), where P(x) = (x-1)^3 * (x^2 + 3*x + 36) and j is Klein's modular function. - _Michael Somos_, Jan 23 2023
